# AGENTS.md Generation

Generate AGENTS.md from all `.dominion/agents/*.toml` files.

## Template

```markdown
<!-- Generated by Dominion — do not edit manually -->
<!-- Regenerate via mcp__dominion__agent_start -->
# Agent Team

Generated: {ISO 8601 timestamp}

## Active Roster

| Agent | Model | Purpose |
|-------|-------|---------|
{for each .dominion/agents/*.toml, read [agent] section:}
| {name} | {model} | {purpose} |

{for each agent, emit dispatch entry:}

## {role}
Description: {purpose from agent TOML}
System prompt: |
  You are a Dominion agent. Call mcp__dominion__agent_start(role: "{role}")
  with the phase_id from your task prompt. Follow the returned methodology exactly.
  Submit your work via mcp__dominion__agent_submit() when complete.
```

Same 3-line system prompt pattern for ALL 17 agents. No methodology in AGENTS.md — methodology is served dynamically by the MCP server via `agent_start`.

Write to project root as `AGENTS.md`.
